headline: OmniAb Names Amechi Nwachuku Chief Operating Officer
summary: EMERYVILLE, Calif., July 13, 2026--OmniAb, Inc. (NASDAQ:OABI), a provider of cutting-edge discovery research technology to enable the discovery of next-generation therapeutics, announces that it has appointed Amechi Nwachuku to the newly-created position of Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective today. Mr. Nwachuku will be primarily responsible for managing the strategy, operations and commercial maximization of xPloration®, OmniAb’s proprietary, innovative high-throughp
